mapper.select: select a.course_id as courseId, b.id as id, b.name as name, 2 as type, b.cover_path as coverPath, b.video_path as videoPath, b.m3u8 as m3u8, b.file_id as fileId, if(c.id is null, 0, 1) as status, b.duration, b.type as courseWay, b.third_party_id thirdPartyId from xm_course_relation_courseware a left join xm_courseware b on a.courseware_id = b.id left join xm_project_person_study_record c on a.course_id = c.course_id and b.id = c.courseware_id and project_id = #{projectId} and person_id = #{personId} where a.is_delete = 0 and b.is_delete = 0 and b.type in (1, 2) and a.course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(b.learn_hours, 0)), 0) AS totalHours FROM xm_course_relation_courseware a LEFT JOIN xm_courseware b ON a.courseware_id = b.id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND a.course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(b.duration, 0)), 0) AS totalHours FROM xm_course_relation_courseware a LEFT JOIN xm_courseware b ON a.courseware_id = b.id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND a.course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(b.learn_hours, 0)), 0) AS totalHours FROM xm_course_relation_courseware a LEFT JOIN xm_courseware b ON a.courseware_id = b.id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND a.course_id IN (SELECT relate_ids FROM xm_project_relate c WHERE c.type = 2 AND project_id = #{projectId})
